global_style: full body, bright gym, photorealistic, realistic anatomy, consistent outfit, stable camera
negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, cartoon, illustration, text, watermark

steps.prompt: front view, trainer standing in front of camera and explaining exercise with subtle silent mouth movement
front view, trainer starts descending into squat with controlled posture
front view, trainer reaches squat bottom position, knees aligned and chest lifted
profile view, trainer holds squat and continues form explanation
three quarter front view, trainer rises from squat with controlled ascent
front view, trainer returns to upright neutral finish pose facing camera
